title: The Impact Of The Middle East Conflict On Dry Bulkers
section_path: The Impact Of The Middle East Conflict On Dry Bulkers
section_path_text: The Impact Of The Middle East Conflict On Dry Bulkers
summary:
Main
According to AXSMarine data, a total of 338 bulkers has been recorded in the Middle East Gulf. This includes 4 Capesizes, 3 Baby Capesizes, 15 Post-Panamaxes, 71 Panamaxes, 23 Ultramaxes, 44 Supramaxes, 17 Handymaxes, and 62 Handysize units, as well as 161 small bulkers. This situation is contributing to a tightening in vessel supply.
